en: Rachel, come on, talk to me, please.
I can't even look at you right now.
What? Nothing, nothing.
You just thought everything was okay.
What are they talking about?
Just get away from me.
It was a mistake. I made a mistake, okay?
A mistake?
What were you trying to put it in?
Her purse?
Ross, you had sex with another woman.
Oh my god. I knew something had to be wrong because my fingernails did not grow at all yesterday.
ko: 오 마이 갓, 뭔가 잘못됐다는 걸 알았어. 내 손톱이 어제 전혀 자라지 않았거든.

en: Yeah, well, I guess they had a fight and he got drunk.
ko: 응, 그들이 싸웠고 그는 술에 취했나 봐.

en: You guys knew about that and you didn't tell us?
ko: 너희는 그걸 알고 있었고, 우리에게 말하지 않았잖아.

en: He has sex and we get hit in our heads?
You know what, I want you to leave.
Get out of here.
No, I want to stay.
I want to talk about this.
Okay, all right. How was she?
What? Was she good?
Don't answer that.
Come on, Ross.
ko: 이봐, 로스, 너 얘기하고 싶다고 했잖아.

en: You said you wanted to talk.
Let's talk about it.
How was she?
She was awful. She was not good. Not good.
She was different.
Good different?
Nobody likes change.
Should we do something?
Yeah, never cheat on Rachel.
I'm sorry, okay?
I'm sorry.
I was disgusted with myself, and this morning I was so upset, and then I got your message,
ko: 내가 너무 싫었고, 오늘 아침에 정말 속상했는데, 네 메시지를 받고,

en: and I was so happy, and all I wanted was to get her out of my apartment as fast as...
ko: 정말 행복했어, 내가 원했던 건 그녀를 내 아파트에서 빨리 내보내는 거였어.

en: Whoa, whoa, whoa, wait a minute.
Oh my god.
She was there?
She was still there?
Hey, the important thing is she meant nothing to me.
ko: 이봐, 중요한 건 그녀가 나에게 아무 의미가 없었어.

en: And yet she was worth jeopardizing our relationship?
ko: 그런데도 우리 관계를 위험에 빠뜨릴 가치가 있었어?

en: Look, I didn't think there was a relationship to jeopardize.
ko: 봐, 나는 위험에 빠뜨릴 관계가 있다고 생각하지 않았어.

en: I thought we were broken up. We were on a break.
That, for all I knew, could last forever.
ko: 우리는 휴식 중이었고, 영원히 지속될 수도 있었어.

en: That, to me, is a breakup.
You think you're gonna get out of this on a technicality?
ko: 기술적인 이유로 빠져나갈 수 있다고 생각해?

en: I'm not trying to get out of anything.
Okay, I thought our relationship was dead.
Well, you sure had a hell of a time at the wake.
ko: 너는 장례식에서 정말 즐거운 시간을 보냈구나.

en: You know what, I don't think we should listen to this anymore.
What are you doing?
I can't go out there. Why not? I'm hungry.
ko: 나 나가고 싶지 않아. 왜? 배고파.

en: They'll know we've been listening. God.
ko: 그들이 우리가 듣고 있었다는 걸 알게 될 거야.

en: I'd have to hear about it from Gunther.
Come on, like I wanted him to tell you.
I ran all over the place trying to make sure that didn't happen.
ko: 그 일이 일어나지 않도록 여기저기 뛰어다녔어.

en: Oh, that is so sweet.
I think I'm falling in love with you all over again.
ko: 너에게 다시 사랑에 빠지는 것 같아.

en: Bye.
